main.description: A verifiable check-in event for a specific service streak.

service.description: The NSID of the service (must match the policy).

policy.description: The AT-URI of the app.starrysky.streak.policy record dictating the rules.

prev.description: Link to the user's previous check-in record for this service. Null if this is the first day.

inventoryRef.description: Link to the latest freeze inventory state used/updated to bridge a gap.

freezesClaimed.description: Number of freezes spent to bridge the temporal gap from the 'prev' record.

witness.description: A cryptographic attestation from a third-party service (Required if policy is 'witnessed').

sig.description: Cryptographic signature of the record or action CID.

subject.description: Optional CID of a specific external resource (e.g., a git commit) being attested to.
